details: The agent successfully navigated all three required sites and produced accurate information: (1) Wikipedia - correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the designer of Rust, confirmed by grep of the page content; (2) GitHub - correctly reported 111k stars, visible in the snapshot showing 'Star 111k'; (3) rust-lang.org - correctly captured the exact tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' from the page heading. All three sites were actually visited and the data matches known facts.
